# Kiran's Fitness Club

> Anjananagar's premier gym on Magadi Main Road, Bangalore — offering expert personal training, modern equipment, and affordable membership plans.

## About

Kiran's Fitness Club is a professional fitness center located at #123 Magadi Main Road, Anjananagar, Bangalore, Karnataka 560091, India.

Founded by Mr. Bangalore Kiran Kumar — a fitness professional with 20+ years of experience and 4000+ members trained — the club provides world-class gym facilities to residents of Anjananagar, Magadi Road, Bath Road, Rajajinagar, Vijayanagar, and surrounding areas.

## Services

- Full gym access with premium imported strength equipment
- Certified personal training (1-on-1 sessions)
- Group fitness classes (HIIT, CrossFit basics, strength training)
- Custom diet and nutrition planning
- Cardio and stretching zones
- Spacious locker facilities

## Membership Plans

- Monthly Plan: ₹1,500/month
- Quarterly Plan: ₹4,000/3 months (most popular)
- Annual Plan: ₹12,000/year

## Opening Hours

- Monday to Saturday: 5:30 AM – 10:00 PM
- Sunday: 6:00 AM – 12:00 PM

## Contact

- Address: #123, Magadi Main Road, Anjananagar, Bangalore 560091
- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 90196 88582
